name: vscode-a11y-bridge
description: Receive accessibility violations from the React Component Highlighter Chrome extension and open them in Copilot Chat with full source context.

a11yBridge.port.description: WebSocket port the server listens on for incoming Chrome extension messages.

a11yBridge.autoStart.description: Automatically start the WebSocket server when VS Code launches.

a11yBridge.sourceRoot.description: Absolute path to your project root, used to resolve dev-server source URLs to local file paths (e.g. /Users/you/project). Leave empty to auto-detect from workspace folders.
